title: Festive Chests
description: Fixes all the chests around Christmas! Client mods recommended. 🎄
body:
🎁 Festive Chests ❄️

## FAQ ### What is this?
Click for answer As you may know, chests, double chests and Minecart with Chests (as well as the chest item, and trapped variants) use a unique texture during Christmas time (over Christmas Eve, Christmas Day and Boxing Day). This pack does two things to match vanilla, ***only during Christmas time***: 1. Gives the `Minecart with Chest` and `Boat with Chest` items unique textures, 2. Gives the `Boat with Chest`, `Llama`, `Donkey` and `Mule` (all with chests) a unique texture. (This requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures))
### How do I get it to work?
Click for answer The entity features will not work without [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or a modpack that includes it like [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo). If you do not wish to install mods, then only the item texture changes will work. The item changes will only work in 1.21.4+ (specifically 24w45a+) due to the newfound ability to define "itemstates". It is impossible to do in versions below that without mods, and I am unaware of any mod that allows for this functionality anyway. The entity features will ***not*** work with OptiFine, as it does not support the required properties.
## Links If this pack interests you, come and join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/x8n6RmP78V)! Be sure to check out my other cool projects, [Pixel Consistency](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-consistency) and [Visuals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visuals)! This resource pack does not have a CurseForge page. If you have found a broken texture in this pack, or would like to request a feature, please let me know in the Discord server. ## Credit If you are a resource pack developer and enjoy my work, I would love if you included any of my textures or models from this pack in yours. Be sure to credit me though! Feel free to upload a video showcasing this resource pack to a third party platform like YouTube! ## Support Me The best way to support me at the moment is by downloading and following my resource packs!
